_readme: Golden dataset for FilingLens numeric-accuracy eval. Each record is a manually-verified (concept, value, source) triple. expected_value is in raw units (e.g. USD, not millions) to match what fetch_xbrl.py stores. source_snippet is the exact text confirming the value, trimmed for readability -- kept short per copyright guidance, not a full reproduction of the filing. Add new records here every time you reconcile a fact by hand; this file is what eval_numeric_accuracy.py will run against once the LLM/agent layer exists.

records.notes: Value in millions in filing text (29,578); matches XBRL value in raw USD. Confirmed consistent across income statement, comprehensive income, and cash flow statement sections.
Confirmed across income statement, segment breakdown table, and deferred revenue note. Apple uses 'net sales' in filing text, not 'revenue'.
Confirmed in income statement, segment table, and MD&A discussion table. MD&A narrative attributes the YoY increase to infrastructure and headcount costs.
